mapper.select: SELECT menu_btn_seq AS menuBtnSeq, menu_seq AS menuSeq, btn_seq AS btnSeq, btn_nm AS btnNm, use_yn AS useYn FROM tb_menu_btn WHERE menu_seq = #{menuSeq} ORDER BY btn_seq

SELECT mb.btn_seq AS btnSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(mb.btn_nm, ''), b.btn_nm) AS btnNm, b.btn_func_cd AS btnFuncCd, b.sort_seq AS sortSeq FROM tb_menu_btn mb JOIN tb_btn b ON mb.btn_seq = b.btn_seq WHERE mb.menu_seq = #{menuSeq} AND mb.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.sort_seq

SELECT DISTINCT mb.btn_seq AS btnSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(mb.btn_nm, ''), b.btn_nm) AS btnNm, b.btn_func_cd AS btnFuncCd, b.sort_seq AS sortSeq FROM tb_menu_btn mb JOIN tb_btn b ON mb.btn_seq = b.btn_seq JOIN tb_auth_menu_btn amb ON amb.menu_seq = mb.menu_seq AND amb.btn_seq = mb.btn_seq JOIN tb_auth_user au ON amb.auth_grp_seq = au.auth_grp_seq AND amb.auth_seq = au.auth_seq JOIN tb_user u ON au.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE mb.menu_seq = #{menuSeq} AND mb.use_yn = 'Y' AND amb.use_yn = 'Y' AND au.use_yn = 'Y' AND u.user_id = #{userId} AND au.str_dt <= TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') AND au.end_dt >= TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY b.sort_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_menu_btn (menu_seq, btn_seq, btn_nm, use_yn, rgst_user_seq, rgst_date_time, upt_user_seq, upt_date_time) VALUES (#{menuSeq}, #{btnSeq}, #{btnNm}, #{useYn}, #{rgstUserSeq}, now(), #{uptUserSeq}, now())
